memoryArtifacts.description: I found the boddiefam.txt on the Internet and was very excited to get it. This document traces “the Royal Lineage of the Boddie Family” all the way back to Julius Caesar. It is extremely well document …

zh.Of, Mashbury, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Everard Esq.於大約1445年出生在英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利時，他的父親John Eugene Everard14歲，母親Katherine Darcy13歲。他於1480年與Mary Joan Cornish在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1529年在英國英格蘭享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Everard Esq. was born about 1445, in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Eugene Everard, was 14 and his mother, Katherine Darcy, was 13. He married Mary Joan Cornish in 1480, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1529, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Everard Esq. est né environ 1445, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Eugene Everard, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Katherine Darcy, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Mary Joan Cornish en 1480, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1529, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1480 in Essex, England Mary Joan Cornish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1529 im Alter von 85 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Everard Esq.が約1445年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで生まれた時，父John Eugene Everardは14歳，母Katherine Darcyは13歳であった。1480年にイギリスエセックスでMary Joan Cornishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1529年にイギリスイギリスで85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Everard Esq.(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 마스h버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Eugene Everard(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Darcy(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 에세스에서 Mary Joan Cornish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Everard Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Eugene Everard, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Darcy, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Joan Cornish em 1480, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1529, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Everard Esq. родился около 1445 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Eugene Everard было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Darcy, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Joan Cornish в 1480 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1529 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.
